action.reasoning: Observation: Validation IC=0.0744 but test IC=0.0426 - huge gap showing overfitting to validation period. The IC-weighted ensemble overfits by weighting models by validation IC. Analysis: 1) Training on 2008-2020 includes very different market regimes from 2022-2023 test. 2) IC-weighted ensemble amplifies overfitting. 3) Need more diverse models (add XGBoost), robust ensemble (simple/rank average), and possibly shorter training window. Decision: Rewrite train.py with: shorter training period (2016-2020), XGBoost for diversity, Huber/fair loss LightGBM variants, CatBoost, save multiple ensemble configs (simple_avg, rank_avg). Use simple average as default since it's more robust to overfitting.
